header.title: Auto-Training
header.subtitle: Schedule up to {{slots}} sessions per day. The system runs automatically every day at 07:00 UTC, after daily energy recovery.

aging.approaching_body: At 33 years old, your player starts losing physical attributes each season. {{seasons}} season(s) to go. Focus on top tiers before decay overtakes training gains.
aging.mature_title: Mature career — light decay ({{age}} years old)
aging.mature_body: Physical attributes drop slightly each end of season. Focused training can still maintain them.
aging.decline_body: Training no longer compensates for the loss. From here on, the player loses more than they gain — make the most of the last minutes on the pitch.
aging.veteran_body: You can retire the player from Profile any time. Keeping playing is optional, but attributes will drop fast.

tip: Tip: average regen is ~{{pct}}% per day. Without a physio under contract, consider training less on days near matches to reach 100% on the pitch.
